_meta.purpose: Canonical roles + permission matrix for JhiguCocina.
_meta.explanation: Roles match src/config/roles.js (customer/staff/manager/admin) and the security-rule access matrix (firestore-architecture.md §6.3). Permissions here are the human-readable source of truth that the security rules and UI RoleGuards encode. This file is reference + seed input; rules remain the enforcement point. Roles are mirrored into Auth custom claims by fnClaimsSync.
_meta.deployment: Consumed by seed/seed.mjs to set custom claims on sample users in the emulator/dev. Not deployed to production directly.
